/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libpine_shared.so -o libpine_shared.so CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/Acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/Connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/Epoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/HttpRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/HttpResponse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/InetAddress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/Server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/Socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pine_shared.dir/ThreadPool.cpp.o
